name: addresspenny
description: Validate, bulk-clean, and extract postal addresses through AddressPenny.
long_description: The AddressPenny extension exposes three tools to your AI agent: validate_address for a single postal address, bulk_validate for up to 100 addresses at once, and parse_and_validate for pulling addresses out of freeform text. Each validated address costs one credit; billing happens through your AddressPenny account. Get an API token at https://addresspenny.com.

tools.name: bulk_validate
tools.description: Validate up to 100 addresses in one request.

tools.name: parse_and_validate
tools.description: Extract and validate addresses from freeform text.

api_key.title: API Token
api_key.description: Your AddressPenny API token. Create one at https://addresspenny.com/developers/api_tokens with the addresses:write scope.

account_id.title: Account ID
account_id.description: Your AddressPenny account prefix ID, e.g. acct_abc123. Find it on your MCP setup page at https://addresspenny.com/developers/mcp.

api_url.title: API Base URL (advanced)
api_url.description: Override the API endpoint. Leave blank unless pointing at staging or a self-hosted instance.
